notes: Post-audit enforcement remediation (run 2026-04-19T22-00Z) — closes five findings the prior 20-00Z run missed: (1) Document Settings policies now actually enforced in documents.router.create + upload.router.upload via new legal/document-policies.ts module (MIME allowlist, size ceiling, required fields); (2) normalizeFilename stopped mutating input.title — now applied only to the real filename in upload.router; (3) tags.delete hard-deletes unreferenced tags and soft-deletes referenced ones inside $transaction, tags.create reactivates soft-deleted namesakes so names remain reusable; (4) retention validator enforces spec bounds retentionDays min 1 max 36500, policies.min(1), and rejects duplicate categoryKey via superRefine; (5) TagsTab static COLOR_SWATCH_CLASSES map replaces dynamic bg-${token}-500 Tailwind purge hole. 303/303 PG-186 tests pass. Webpack build compiles (29.1s). Broader failures in PG-187/189/190 and one unrelated support/article-admin-columns.tsx typecheck issue disclosed in delivery.md and NOT claimed as PG-186 PASS.
